---

This is the 50-day special offer. If you sell air conditions I want you to go give them or offer them a free filter. If you wash cars offer a free wash. If you do your barbershop offer a free cut pedicure manicure something. On the 50 day I want you to do a free offer. Now look most offers are never redeemed so it's not going to cost you anything. It's an offer. It's a reason to follow up your customer at 50 days. This will be your 12th plus a couple follow-ups. This is when you want to do a special offer. I'm not asking her to buy. I'm asking to give them something. It could be something to do with your company or something not even related. Try that and I'll see you at 60 days.
